## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of the issue.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Console Errors

Paste any browser console errors (F12 → Console) here.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 120 |
| Wallet | e.g. Petra 1.x |
| Network | Testnet / Mainnet |
| App URL | e.g. https://inbox3-aptos.vercel.app or localhost |

Any other context about the problem.
